author: sixtarocyan
description: Interactive folder dashboard with timeline and board views, filters, drag sorting, and saved page presets. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: cyanwang
manifest.description: Interactive folder dashboard with timeline and board views, filters, drag sorting, and saved page presets.
manifest.name: Smart Folder View

name: Smart Folder View

releases.author: sixtarocyan
releases.description:
## 0.1.1

### Fixed
- Improved chronological sorting for time-like fields.
- Fixed ordering for BCE, ancient history, year ranges, decades, and large negative year values.
- Preserved normal sorting behavior for non-time fields.
- Prevented exported Smart Folder pages from polluting Obsidian global properties.
- Stopped exported Smart Folder blocks from auto-opening recursively when rendered inside Smart Folder cards.
- Fixed saved preset restoration for board group fields, view mode, and sort order.
- Fixed preset save cancellation handling so modal close actions no longer leave pending promises.

releases.author: sixtarocyan
releases.description: Initial release of Smart Folder View.
